results.notes: Offer Services toggle changes button to 'Create Provider Account'
'Name must be at least 2 characters' for 1-char
'Password must be at least 8 characters' for 7-char
All 3 errors appear on empty submit
User object stored with all correct fields
'Email already registered' error banner for duplicate
Error clears on retry with new email
Tab order logical: logo→nav→roles→fields→submit→sign in. Note: extra hidden submit button
Enter key submits form from password field
Both role buttons fit within 375px width
XSS script stored as text, not executed. React escapes HTML
Password in POST body, not URL params
Full response structure: user obj + accessToken + refreshToken
BUG DOCUMENTED: Client minLength=2 vs server minLength=1 for name
Loading state with spinner + 'Creating account...' during submission
BUG: Double submit NOT prevented. Rapid clicks fire 2 API calls (2nd gets 409). isLoading state doesn't disable fast enough for sync double-click
Email with space rejected: 'Please enter a valid email'
Client trims name before sending. Server stores as-is.
firstName='Jane' from 'Jane Smith' for welcome message
BUG DOCUMENTED: Space-only password (8 spaces) accepted by server. No complexity rules.
BUG DOCUMENTED: Inputs lack name/autocomplete attributes
BUG DOCUMENTED: No aria-describedby linking errors to inputs
Error clears after valid input + blur
Tablet 768px renders clean, full nav visible
SQL injection handled safely (stored as text)
JWT claims: sub, email, role, iat, exp
Form retains input after error (all fields preserved)
Red border + focus ring on invalid fields confirmed
Empty body → 400 with all validation errors listed

bugs.title: Double submit not prevented - rapid clicks fire duplicate API calls
bugs.description: Clicking Create Account rapidly twice fires 2 API requests. The isLoading state transition is async (setState), so the button isn't disabled fast enough for synchronous double-clicks. The second request gets a 409 Conflict.
bugs.reproduction: Fill form, programmatically click submit twice synchronously
bugs.impact: May cause confusing 409 error flash or duplicate records if email is unique per attempt

bugs.title: Client-server validation mismatch: name minLength (client=2, server=1)
bugs.description: Client requires name >= 2 chars but server accepts >= 1 char. A single-character name is valid on the server but blocked by the UI.
bugs.impact: API consumers can create 1-char names but UI users cannot

bugs.title: Space-only password accepted by server
bugs.description: A password of 8 spaces passes both client and server validation. No password complexity requirements exist.
bugs.impact: Users can set extremely weak passwords

bugs.title: Accessibility gaps: missing name, autocomplete, aria-describedby attributes
bugs.description: All input fields lack name, autocomplete, and aria-describedby attributes. Browser warns about autocomplete. Screen readers cannot programmatically associate error messages with fields.
bugs.impact: Reduced accessibility for assistive technology users, browser autocomplete broken
